questions.text: The average of a set of observations is called:
questions.explanation: Mean (average) = Sum of all observations / Total number of observations.

questions.text: Mode is the most frequently occurring observation.
questions.explanation: Mode is the value that appears most frequently in a data set.

questions.correctAnswer: A graphical representation of data using bars of uniform width.
questions.explanation: Bar graphs use rectangular bars to represent data. Height/length of bars is proportional to values.

questions.text: The probability of a certain event is ________.
questions.explanation: Probability of a certain event = 1. Probability of impossible event = 0.
